subject: Customer Engagement Update — Immediate Attention
body_paragraphs: Following up on our recent conversations, I want to ensure we are aligned on the current state of this partnership.

There are a few outstanding items from our last business review that have not been formally addressed. The customer has referenced these in multiple interactions, and we should proactively close them out.
Please review the attached context and let me know if you are available for a call this week to discuss our approach.
